## Title: Fix signed/unsigned integer comparison mismatch in Msg4 retransmission check

### Summary
The `check_Msg4_retransmission` function in the eNB MAC scheduler contained a signed/unsigned integer comparison mismatch that could lead to incorrect branching behavior and compiler warnings. The local variable `round` was declared as a signed `int` but was being compared against unsigned values in the HARQ status checking logic, creating a type mismatch that violates C language semantics and cou
